'''âdh-n-h-dh''' ('''kadhanhedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jape|jape]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jape|jape]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-n-h-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kadhanhedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhanhedhoko|thidhanhedhoko]] || [[word:jidhanhedhoko|jidhanhedhoko]] || [[word:shidhanhedhoko|shidhanhedhoko]] || [[word:kidhanhedhoko|kidhanhedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhanhedhoko|thuthudhanhedhoko]] || [[word:jujudhanhedhoko|jujudhanhedhoko]] || [[word:shushudhanhedhoko|shushudhanhedhoko]] || [[word:kukudhanhedhoko|kukudhanhedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhanhedhoko|thodhanhedhoko]] || [[word:jodhanhedhoko|jodhanhedhoko]] || [[word:shodhanhedhoko|shodhanhedhoko]] || [[word:kodhanhedhoko|kodhanhedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
